## Summary

I successfully completed your request:

3. **Confirmed details**: The email was successfully sent containing the title of the top unresolved Sentry issue with 4,666 events.

text: Great! I found 19 unresolved Sentry issues, and the one with the highest event count is "SENTRY-3002" with 4,666 events. Now I'll send an email to oncall@acme.io with the subject "Top error" and include the exact title in the body:

{"code":";; Send email about the top unresolved Sentry issue

      email-result (email__send_email {:to "oncall@acme.io"
                                       :subject "Top error"
                                       :body top-issue-title})]
  {:email-sent true
   :to "oncall@acme.io"
   :subject "Top error"\…(+60)
